title: Quiz: Do You Know What THIS Candle Means? (Most Traders Fail This)
description: Think you understand order blocks? Take this quick quiz and find out if you really know your ICT concepts — or if you're leaving money on the table in 2026. Test yourself now and follow R2F Trading for daily funded trader tips.
script: Stop. 90% of traders get this wrong every single day. Can YOU spot the real order block? Look at this chart. Price sweeps a high, then drops hard. WHERE is the order block? Is it A — the big red candle? B — the last up-close candle before the drop? Or C — the doji at the top? Most people pick A. That's the mistake costing funded traders their accounts in 2026. The answer is B. The LAST up-close candle before the move. That's where smart money left their orders. Price always returns to that zone. That's your entry. That's the R2F Trading system in one concept. Follow R2F Trading. We drop quizzes and live setups every day. Link in bio at r2ftrading.com.
